subcodes.first_line: O candle of the love of God! That which thou hadst written was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملحوظ افتاد
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @unity in diversity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
